text:
From: WCS Media <media@waltercuminns.com>
Sent: 13 November 2025 11:55
Subject: WCS News Letter - Shipping Industry & Baltic Index updates

We are pleased to share the latest editions of the WCS Newsletter - November 2025, featuring the Daily Shipping Industry Updates and Baltic Index Insights, covering vessel movements, freight trends, and maritime developments from key global ports.

At Walter Cuminns, we take pride in delivering timely, precise, and real-time shipping intelligence, ensuring transparent communication and seamless assistance for vessels calling at all Indian seaports.
